notes: All 128 cells (16 cols x 8 rows) are non-empty. Row 32 = crystal wands (c0-5) then whips/scourges (c6-15). Row 33 = bows (c0-9) then wands/scepters (c10-15). Row 34 = crossbows/boomerangs/thrown (c0-6), quivers (c7-9), bombs (c10-11), dynamite (c12-15). Row 35 = firearms (c0-6), ammo boxes/crates (c7-15). Rows 36-37 = shields. Rows 38-39 = body armor.
